# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
  CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
  CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing..."

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying..."
    - git config --global user.email "ci-automated@${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.gitlab.com"
    - git config --global user.name "${CI_PROJECT_NAME} CI/CD"
    - git add .
    - git commit -m "[${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}] ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
    - git push origin HEAD:${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com

after_script:
  stage: after_script
  script:
    - echo "Deployment tags: ${CI_PROJECT_NAME} - ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
  only:
    - main
